core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Automotive Precision with Swiss Design clarity.
Content is king: Data legibility is paramount.
Zoom in: Focus on hall availability details.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to reduce cognitive load.
anti_patterns: Center-Everything (Use strong left alignment for data)

theme.description: A clean, high-contrast interface inspired by automotive showrooms and precision instruments. Dominant whites/silvers with deep navy accents.

rules.headings: Manrope (Bold/ExtraBold) for crisp, modern headers. No Inter.
rules.body: Inter or system-ui for maximum legibility at small sizes.
rules.data: JetBrains Mono for time slots and booking IDs.

gradients.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(0, 44, 95, 0.05), transparent 40%)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-md rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary-900 hover:bg-secondary/20 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 text-accent-700 hover:text-accent-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-white hover:bg-destructive/90 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 shadow-sm

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/50 hover:ring-2 hover:ring-primary/5 transition-all group

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-slate-900 text-white p-6 hidden md:flex flex-col z-50
navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn: Ensure all base components (Button, Input, Card, Dialog, Select, Table) are installed.
2. Pages Structure: Create distinct layouts for Auth (Centered) vs Dashboard (Sidebar + Header).
3. Auth Flow: Implement specific @hmil.net validation in the form schema (zod).
4. Hall Cards: Display the 3 halls with their specific images. Use 'Available'/'Booked' badges.
5. Calendar: Use a full-width calendar or a list of time slots. The time slots are fixed (8-10, 10-12, 1-3, 3-5).
6. Admin: Admin dashboard must show a 'Pending Requests' table with Approve/Reject actions.
7. Notifications: Use Sonner for success/error toasts. Also build a visual notification center in the UI.
8. Database: Ensure MongoDB schemas support the 'pending' -> 'approved' workflow.
9. Dark Mode: If implementing, ensure contrast ratios are maintained. Default to Light Mode for this corporate tool.
10. Empty States: Always provide a helpful empty state (e.g., 'No bookings found. Book your first hall!')
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use grid-based asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-8 instead of p-4).
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (hover, focus, active).
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
